author: @carolineolsenarnold7039
text: I was 5 yrs old when my mum took me to see Snow White. It was my first visit to the cinema and it was glorious. I knew the story well as mum read all the stories to me. Seeing it in full technocolor was beyond  beautiful. I am now 74 yrs old and still get that feeling i had then. This new woke version is almost blasphemous in my humble opinion. How can you tell the story without love, without a prince? There will be no story left to tell. Todays children are being raised with no stories or tales that meant so much to so many generations. No imagination is allowed. They will never know the joy we older ones have known, anyone else agree? I will not watch it. Just knowing how she really feels about the story is enough to put me off.

Now Hollywood is deciding the actors they want to make stars, and even when that person falls flat on the screen, they keep casting them.  Pedro Pascal is one of their chosen ones, even getting cast in roles he doesn’t suit.  While Henry Caville and Gina Carano are sidelined.
